page.content: In Table 1, titled "Iteration," the headers include "Nominal," "Duration [ms]," "Peak [μT]," and "NRMSE [%]" for both GIRF and another unspecified category. The body reveals that for Iteration 1, the values are 10.39, 45.12, and 56 for the first category and 10.39, 30.94, and 8 for GIRF. In Iteration 2, the values are 12.84, 13.08, and 18 for the first category and 11.78, 20.05, and 7 for GIRF. For Iteration 3, the statistics are 12.93, 11.38, and 18 for the first category and 12.21, 13.67, and 7 for GIRF.

page.content: Iteration 4 has no values listed for the first category, with GIRF showing 12.36, 13.24, and 7. Iteration 5 also has no values for the first category, while GIRF shows 12.42, 11.40, and 7. Table 2, titled "Treatment," includes headers "Dose (mg/kg)," "1st h," "2nd h," "3rd h," and "4th h." The Vehicle treatment has a dose of – with 0.93 ± 0.19, 1.65 ± 0.30, 2.61 ± 0.21, and 2.83 ± 0.20 across the hours. Piroxicam at 30 mg/kg shows 0.29 ± 0.11 **, 0.26 ± 0.04 **, 0.83 ± 0.14 **, and 1.37 ± 0.24 *. The Methanolic extract at 7.81 mg/kg has 0.71 ± 0.12, 0.83 ± 0.26, 1.07 ± 0.25 *, and 1.92 ± 0.13. The 15.62 mg/kg dosage shows 0.30 ± 0.06 **, 0.40 ± 0.07 **, 0.88 ± 0.15 **, and 1.76 ± 0.21 **. Finally, the 31.25 mg/kg dosage displays 0.38 ± 0.01 **, 0.50 ± 0.12 **, 0.59 ± 0.12 **, and 1.01 ± 0.27 *.
